humanEffortEstimate.rationale: P5 execution covered a full merged Vitest suite, coverage collection, flaky failure triage, bug filing, and story-to-test traceability across eight Sprint 2 stories and five bug IDs.

frameworkObservations.observation: The Azure Boards create-work-item script rejected symbolic severity values without surfacing the accepted enum and one bug-creation invocation entered an interactive prompt loop.
frameworkObservations.suggestion: Document the supported severity values in the skill reference and make bug creation fully non-interactive with a deterministic error message.
